prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SEMITRUCK-377B-WHT Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplay Existing Title: Remote Control RC Semi Toy Truck Cargo Carrier Lights Sounds - 23 Inch Description: Give some serious FUN this holiday season (or any other gift-giving occasion for that matter), with the very cool Kidplokio Remote Control Car RC Truck Semi Cargo Carrier with lights, sounds and of course, remote control or radio control action. Kids and young children will love and relish the independence that comes from maneuvering their very own RC truck all by themselves.

Featuring stop, start, left, and right control functions, operating on a standard 27 MHz cycle and controlled by a uniquely designed mini steering wheel remote, kids will easily and safely learn how to operate the semi-truck cargo carrier with just a few practice-runs under their belt.

And, as if there wasn't already enough fun, this RC truck comes with road-like sounds and unique lights, making your little ones' play experience a sensory and interactive one. It's also a great toy to improve your little ones' fine motor skills, as well as their eye-hand coordination.

Lastly, parents won't have to worry about charging the RC truck for their little ones. Requiring nine (9) 1.5V AA batteries, racing and driving remote control fun can start as soon as the RC truck comes out of the box and the batteries are in.

NOTE: Optimal performance will take place on a hard and smooth surface

NOTE: Batteries are NOT included with purchase

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts) Search Terms: radio control cars remote semi truck toys accessories gifts for boys and trailer toy cargo carrier trucks young Features: - RC TRUCK CARGO CARRIER: Give the gift of FUN this holiday season with the very cool Kidplokio Remote Control Car RC Truck Semi Cargo Carrier with lights, sounds and of course, remote control or radio control action! Kids and young children will love the independence that comes from maneuvering their very own RC truck all by themselves - EASY FOR KIDS TO USE: Featuring stop, start, left and right control functions, operating on a standard 27 MHz cycle and controlled by a uniquely designed mini steering wheel remote, kids will easily and safely learn how to operate the semi truck cargo carrier with just a few practice runs under their belt - SENSORY SOUNDS AND LIGHTS: Playtime is revving up with cool sounds and bright lights! The remote control truck features road-like sounds and unique lights, making your little ones play experience a sensory and interactive one, as they race the RC truck; optimal performance will take place on a hard and smooth surface - BATTERIES AND GO: Parents don't have to worry about charging the RC truck for little ones; requiring nine (9) 1.5V AA batteries (not included), playtime fun can start as soon as the RC truck comes out of the box and batteries are in! - SPECIFICATIONS: Box Dimensions: 31 x 7.5 x 5.75 inches; Color: Multi; Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Note: batteries NOT included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplay 23 Inch Remote Control RC Semi Truck Cargo
